Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Way Between Worlds]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Fiends require human Intent to cross the Way Between Worlds with intention.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Way Between Worlds can be tapped into to open a celestial lens.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Messages travel through the Way Between Worlds.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Way Between Worlds is a term used by Eithan for the flows of order beneath reality.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — The Way Between Worlds is a membrane of reality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Way Between Worlds is the power of pure order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — The Way Between Worlds is a destination or path for the Waybound.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider can normally reach the Way Between Worlds.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
